finding: Byte-parity: the moved testid generator run in WRITE mode from BOTH `ui/` and `desktop/ui/` cwds reproduces the committed `sdk/packages/kit/src/testIds.generated.ts` (1590 ids) with a ZERO diff (set + order + trailer identical). The header string is kept verbatim, so the committed kit registry is byte-unchanged. `--check` passes from both cwds (exit 0).

The sdk-testinfra STOP-rule (STOP on a genuine id conflict) was cleared by PROOF, not force-fit: union(ui/src, desktop/ui/src, kit/src, shell/src) under the same walk exclusions == the committed kit registry, byte-identical. The prior 1588-vs-1590 gap was exactly the kit/shell PACKAGE-src ids (app-root/app-sidebar/layout-sidebar-resize-handle in @ziee/shell; the pagination `${testid}-row-…` literal in @ziee/kit) the app-only walk cannot see. `kitTestIds` adds those package roots; no wrong registry was written.

xvfb-run drove the desktop gallery Vite server headless: the rendered [data-testid=gallery-root] carries data-gallery-build-marker=ZIEE_GALLERY_SEED_MARKER — a marker ONLY the package GalleryPage emits (the deleted desktop GalleryPage.tsx never had it) — and 50 gallery-page-* surfaces enumerate. Definitive proof the desktop canvas renders THROUGH @ziee/gallery, not the (deleted) local copy or the (retired) shim.

check:testid-registry passes from BOTH cwds: ui/gallery.config.json + the NEW desktop/ui/gallery.config.json each describe the SAME union with cwd-relative roots (../.. vs ../../.. to the sdk). Sorted output identical → the single committed registry is byte-stable regardless of which workspace's --check runs. Preserves the old HERE-relative generator's cwd-independence via mirrored config instead of package-dir hardcodes.

discoverGalleries returns the pre-merged shared+desktop cassette as ONE synthetic entry (+ desktop galleries with cassette stripped). The package's initSurfaces re-runs mergeModuleCassettes over the list; a single cassette-bearing entry means NO duplicate-key collision — mergeModuleCassettes THROWS on cross-entry key overlap, which the old `{...shared,...desktop}` spread silently tolerated (desktop-wins). The synthetic-entry shape preserves desktop-wins AND the no-throw guarantee.

Page-focus preserved: the synthetic entry carries only a cassette (no overlay/deep/seeded/story class), and the desktop-only galleries carry none today — so shared web PAGES render populated (settings-js-tool proven via the cross-workspace cassette e2e) while the web overlay/deep/seeded/story ENTRIES are NOT inherited, identical to the pre-rewire behavior. The desktop-only entries pass through with cassette omitted so any FUTURE non-cassette surface still flows.

The web re-export SHIM is git-rm'd; its sole consumer (desktop module-seed.ts) now imports the pure merge/assert from @ziee/gallery directly. The 8 desktop framework copies (GalleryPage/pages/overlays/surfaces/matrix/useGalleryTheme/story/seed) are git-rm'd — the generic engine exists ONCE (in the package). Grep confirms zero remaining `registry-core` references outside the package's own registry/registry-core.ts.

tsc = 0 on all three: @ziee/gallery, ui, desktop/ui. node --test on the gallery scripts = 21 pass / 0 fail (4 new gen-testid + 3 overlay + 14 seed). biome noRestrictedImports guardrails clean on ui + desktop src. desktop check:gallery-seed-registry OK (9 modules).

The web gallery is UNTOUCHED except additive config: support/registry.ts + support/index.ts + support/types.ts + galleryConfig.ts + main.tsx unchanged; ui/gallery.config.json only GAINS kitTestIds+testidOut (existing scripts read neither historically). New config defaults (kitTestIds:[], testidOut:null) reproduce the pre-package in-app behavior → a config-less app is unchanged. ui tsc = 0, web gallery boot serves gallery.html HTTP 200.

Desktop runtime-health (report-only, loaded/light, against the live rewired server): 50 surfaces audited, HIGH 0 gating / MEDIUM 0 / LOW 45 (informational spacing-grid). The rewire introduces ZERO new gating HIGH runtime finding. Plus the 14 desktop gallery e2e specs (2 seed + 6 override + 6 runtime render/axe) pass with zero console/page error + axe clean, light+dark. RUNTIME_FINDINGS.* are gitignored (not staged).

Pure frontend: git status shows ZERO changes to any api-client/types.ts / openapi.json / .rs / migration / .sql; the kit testIds.generated.ts is byte-identical to committed. The gallery stays DEV-only — the package GalleryPage still emits the ZIEE_GALLERY_SEED_MARKER prod-exclusion sentinel (reachable only via the DEV-gated lazy import), so check-gallery-prod-exclusion's tree-shake guard is intact. mockApi is the mock ENGINE (dev-only), no secret/token surface. vendor/pgvector NOT touched/staged.

The generator names only its own DI seam: resolveGalleryConfig fields (srcDir/extraTrees/kitTestIds/testidOut). Zero @/ imports, zero ziee paths baked in. kitTestIds:[] + testidOut:null default to the historical in-app layout (walk srcDir, write <srcDir>/components/ui/testIds.generated.ts), so the package is genuinely app-agnostic; ziee supplies the kit/shell roots + kit output path via its two gallery.config.json files.
